added.summary: New fork patch changes SkBitmap::getSubset() return type from SkIRect to SkRect. API change in m122 that the fork adjusts to maintain compatibility.
New fork patch adds SKOTTIE_TRIVIAL_FONTRUN_ITER compile toggle. Provides TrivialFontRunIterator fallback for Chrome Linux/CrOS with no fallback-capable fontmgr (crbug.com/1520148).
New fork patch adds SkSafeMath overflow checks for rectangle count accumulation in dash rendering to prevent integer overflow exploits.
New fork patch adds SkSafeMath overflow check for quad count in atlas draw op combine, returning kCannotCombine on overflow.
New fork patch adds overflow bounds check for repeatCount * verticesPerRepetition in PatternHelper::init to prevent buffer overflows on large draws.
New fork patch adds SkSafeMath overflow check for rectangle count accumulation in lattice draw operations.
New fork patch adds SkSafeMath overflow check for rectangle count in region draw operations to prevent integer overflow.
New fork patch changes allocateSlotData to return std::optional with SkSafeMath overflow protection for slot allocation. Security fix preventing arithmetic overflow in shader compilation.
New fork patch updates allocateSlotData declaration to return std::optional<SlotData> matching the implementation change in the .cpp file.
New fork patch adds SkDeserialProcs with fAllowSkSL=false for SkDrawable deserialization. Security fix preventing SkSL code execution from untrusted typeface data.

removed.summary: Old fork patch added use_PIC, enable_bitcode, visibility_hidden, Apple platform SDK changes, WinRT support. Dropped because upstream m122 restructured build system.
Old fork patch added Tizen toolchain support (ncli-based clang) and WinRT MSVC environment setup. Dropped as platform customizations handled differently in m122.
Old fork patch conditionally excluded WGL files for WinRT builds. Dropped because WGL exclusion no longer needed or handled upstream.
Old fork added SkFontMgr::MakeDefault() convenience method. Dropped in m122 where font manager factory model changed to platform-specific singletons.
Old fork added SkTypeface::RefDefault() cached singleton accessor. Dropped in m122 where typeface factories removed from SkTypeface class.
Old fork added SkTypeface::RefDefault() implementation using SkOnce singleton pattern. Dropped in m122 alongside the header declaration removal.
Old fork replaced GLX header includes with dlopen/dlsym-based GLXLoader to avoid direct GLX dependency. Dropped as no longer needed.
Old fork changed Metal MakeMetal to use retain() instead of reset() for device/queue CFTypeRef handles. Dropped as API restructured in m122.
Old fork increased fontconfig max pattern ID limit from 16 to 256 for Tizen fonts. Dropped as Tizen-specific patches no longer maintained.
Old fork removed ARM64 exclusion guard to enable WGL on Windows ARM64. Dropped as upstream m122 handles this differently.
Old fork increased display length from 36 to 86 chars and commented out emsdk activation. Dropped as these tweaks no longer needed.

changed.summary: Fork renames Go files with .disabled prefix. Patch differs because upstream m122 has different Go module repository definitions (version bumps, added/removed repos).
Fork renames go.mod with .disabled prefix. Patch differs from Go dependency bumps across milestones (pubsub, storage, glog, uuid). Go version 1.18 to 1.21.
Fork renames go.sum with .disabled prefix. Checksum database updated for new go.mod versions. Reduced from ~905 to ~465 entries.

DEPS fork patches changed. Old fork commented out many deps (angle2, dawn, jinja2, etc.) that new fork keeps. Security pins updated: expat, freetype, harfbuzz. Pattern changed from broad exclusion to selective pinning.

Removed 6 typeface factory C API declarations. Added fontmgr C API declarations (unref, count_families, get_family_name, create_styleset, match_family, match_family_style). Reflects SkTypeface-to-SkFontMgr migration.
Added 5 new type definition lines. Includes skresources_image_decode_strategy_t enum and updated GrVkYcbcrConversionInfo mapping (DEF_STRUCT_MAP to DEF_MAP with SK_VULKAN guard).
Added _make2 variants for file resource provider and data URI provider using ImageDecodeStrategy enum instead of bool. Preserves old bool-based API alongside new enum API.
Changed GrDirectContext::MakeGL/MakeVulkan to GrDirectContexts::MakeGL/MakeVulkan (namespace move m120/m122). Added GpuTypes.h and platform-specific DirectContext headers.

Added platform default typeface via skiasharp_ref_default_fontmgr(). sk_font_new() now passes default typeface to SkFont (nullptr creates empty typeface in m122). Null typeface param falls back to default.
Added include/gpu/GpuTypes.h header. Minimal change for GPU type definitions moved in m122 namespace reorganization.

Removed 6 typeface factory implementations. Added platform-specific font manager singleton (skiasharp_ref_default_fontmgr) for Mac/iOS, Windows, Android, Fontconfig, embedded. Added fontmgr C API implementations.
Added 2 new type mapping lines for GrVkYcbcrConversionInfo (DEF_MAP change) and skresources_image_decode_strategy_t enum mapping.
Refactored bool-based _make to delegate to _make2 using ImageDecodeStrategy enum. predecode bool maps to PRE_DECODE/LAZY_DECODE. Maintains backward compat while exposing new enum API.
Updated SkCompatPaint constructor to use platform default typeface via shared fontmgr singleton. In m122, SkFont(nullptr) creates empty typeface; this preserves legacy behavior.

added.name: abseil-cpp
added.summary: Google Abseil C++ library. Required by Dawn for string formatting. Present in upstream m122 DEPS.

added.name: angle2
added.summary: ANGLE graphics translation layer. GPU backend dependency for OpenGL ES emulation.

added.name: dawn
added.summary: WebGPU implementation. Required for Dawn/WebGPU GPU backend support.

added.name: egl-registry
added.summary: Khronos EGL API registry headers.

added.name: emsdk
added.summary: Emscripten SDK for WebAssembly/WASM builds.

added.name: highway
added.summary: Google Highway SIMD library for portable vector operations.

added.name: icu
added.summary: ICU (International Components for Unicode) Chromium dependency.

added.name: icu4x
added.summary: ICU4X Unicode library (Rust-based). Newer Unicode support.

added.name: imgui
added.summary: Dear ImGui library. Used for Skia debugging/viewer tools.

added.name: jinja2
added.summary: Jinja2 template engine. Required by Dawn code generator.

added.name: libavif
added.summary: AVIF image format library.

added.name: libgav1
added.summary: AV1 video decoder library.

added.name: libgrapheme
added.summary: Unicode grapheme cluster library.

added.name: libjxl
added.summary: JPEG XL image format library.

added.name: libyuv
added.summary: YUV conversion and scaling library.

added.name: markupsafe
added.summary: MarkupSafe HTML escaping library. Required by Jinja2/Dawn.

added.name: microhttpd
added.summary: GNU libmicrohttpd HTTP server library.

added.name: oboe
added.summary: Google Oboe audio library for Android.

added.name: opengl-registry
added.summary: Khronos OpenGL API registry headers.

added.name: perfetto
added.summary: Perfetto performance tracing framework.

added.name: sfntly
added.summary: Google sfntly font library for font subsetting.

added.name: spirv-headers
added.summary: Khronos SPIR-V headers for GPU shader compilation.

added.name: spirv-tools
added.summary: Khronos SPIR-V tools for shader validation and optimization.

added.name: swiftshader
added.summary: SwiftShader CPU-based GPU implementation for software rendering.

added.name: unicodetools
added.summary: Unicode Tools for Unicode data processing.

added.name: vello
added.summary: Vello GPU compute vector renderer.

added.name: vulkan-deps
added.summary: Vulkan dependency aggregator repository.

added.name: vulkan-tools
added.summary: Khronos Vulkan tools (vulkaninfo, etc.).

added.name: vulkan-utility-libraries
added.summary: Khronos Vulkan utility libraries.

changed.name: spirv-cross
changed.summary: SPIRV-Cross shader cross-compiler revision bumped for SPIR-V to GLSL/HLSL/MSL translation.

changed.name: vulkan-headers
changed.summary: Vulkan API headers revision bumped. Defines Vulkan types, enums, and function prototypes.

changed.name: vulkanmemoryallocator
changed.summary: Vulkan Memory Allocator (VMA) revision bumped. GPU memory allocation library for Vulkan backend.
